import time
import json


def benchmark_json_throughput():
    tiny_payload = json.dumps({"id": 1})
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(10000):
        json.loads(tiny_payload)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    print(f"JSON throughput: {elapsed:.4f}s for 10000 iterations")


def benchmark_search():
    small_list = list(range(10))
    target = 5
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(10000):
        _ = target in small_list
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    print(f"Search throughput: {elapsed:.4f}s")


def benchmark_serialize():
    data = {"key": "value"}
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(5000):
        result = json.dumps(data)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    print(f"Serialize throughput: {elapsed:.4f}s")
